# J.R. Corvane

J.R. Corvane is a New England–based author of adult epic fantasy. Corvane writes about ancient power, buried histories, political consequence, morally complicated choices, and hard-won hope.

## Primary pages

- [Official author website](https://jrcorvane.com/): Overview of J.R. Corvane, the books, and current releases.
- [About J.R. Corvane](https://jrcorvane.com/about/): Author biography and creative influences.
- [Blood of the Bound](https://jrcorvane.com/blood-of-the-bound/): Book One of The Sundering Bloodlines, currently in edits.
- [The Sundering Bloodlines](https://jrcorvane.com/the-sundering-bloodlines/): A planned adult epic fantasy trilogy about inherited power, buried history, and the cost of prophecy.
- [The Uncounted](https://jrcorvane.com/the-uncounted/): A free prequel short story set generations before Blood of the Bound.

## Canonical facts

- Author name: J.R. Corvane
- Primary genre: Adult epic fantasy
- Series: The Sundering Bloodlines
- First novel: Blood of the Bound
- Free reader story: The Uncounted
- Location: New England, United States
- Official domain: https://jrcorvane.com/
